Evidence/Request Item: SC-8 transmission confidentiality matrix for east-west and north-south paths listing enforced TLS versions and cipher suites per service class.
Assessor Comments: Comment from Assessor: Matrix must cite live listener config export IDs not Visio-only narrative.

Evidence/Request Item: SI-5 security warning banner deployment log with SSO-attested user view counts per release channel and banner text version identifier.
Assessor Comments: Comment from Assessor: Log must join to SSO application client IDs not web server access log only.

Evidence/Request Item: AC-10 concurrent session limit policy export for privileged profiles documenting lockout-on-excess behavior and helpdesk override audit requirements.
Assessor Comments: Comment from Assessor: Export must be production realm policy JSON not sandbox defaults.

Evidence/Request Item: RA-9 criticality analysis workbook mapping system components to impact categories with scoring rubric tied to most recent risk assessment refresh.
Assessor Comments: Comment from Assessor: Workbook must reference component IDs from the authoritative system register not marketing names only.

Evidence/Request Item: CP-8 alternate telecommunications service provider inventory with failover activation test dates and contract renewal milestones for crisis voice bridge.
Assessor Comments: Comment from Assessor: Inventory must include carrier account numbers redacted per privacy policy.
